name: Lemon Chiffon Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the Daisy sour cream, milk, powdered sugar, and frozen lemonade concentrate in a bowl.
2. Mix one drop of food coloring with about 1/4 of the sauce until well combined.
3. Pour the colored sauce into a squeeze bottle.
4. Cover individual serving plates with uncolored sauce.
5. Arrange fruit on top of each plate.
6. Use the colored sauce to create designs on each serving.
7. Garnish with mint.
